Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "X29FIGHTERMISSION-0A00-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "X-29 Fighter Mission.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0A00 to zero out the tape buffer to prevent graphical issues in the game. It then jumps to the entry point at $8000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the zeroing overwriting the boot code).
The following modifications were made to accept the fire button in port 2 instead of using down to start the game from the title screen and up to restart the game from the game over screen:
1. The AND #$02 instruction at $801F was changed to AND #$10 2. The LDA $DC00 instruction at $1085 was changed to JSR $0900 3. A new routine was added at $0900 to check the fire button in port - if it is pressed, it waits for it to be depressed before returning $00 in the accumulator to allow the game to start just as if the joystick was pushed up.
